title: Osmium
description: Osmium adds quality of life features to mincraft, much like popular PvP clients. For fabric 1.17 and above.
body:
# Osmium

## Basics
Osmium is a quality of life mod for fabric 1.17 and above that adds features similar to PvP clients like Badlion Client and Lunar Client.

## Features

Features include
- ToggleSprint
- ToggleSneak
- Fullbright
- No rain
- Fps display
- Low fire
- NoHurtBob
- Custom cape rendering
- Block outline
- Fly boost
- Disable nether particles
- Disable firework particles
